memoryArtifacts.headline: Death date wrong??
memoryArtifacts.description: It's stated that William Lindsay of Lamberton died in battle against Llywellyn, Prince of Wales.  Llywellyn was murdered Dec. 11, 1282, so the battle date is correct except of the year

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton於1250年6月24日出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾莫丁頓時，他的父親Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton20歲，母親Christina Nasmith17歲。他於大約1266年6月與Ada De Baliol在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1283年11月6日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton于1250年6月24日出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾莫丁頓时，他的父亲Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton20岁，母亲Christina Nasmith17岁。他于大约1266年6月与Ada De Baliol在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1283年11月6日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton was born on 24 June 1250, in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, was 20 and his mother, Christina Nasmith, was 17. He married Ada De Baliol about June 1266, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 6 November 1283, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton est né le 24 juin 1250, à Mordington, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Christina Nasmith, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Ada De Baliol environ juin 1266, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1283, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton am 24. Juni 1250 in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton 20 und seine Mutter Christina Nasmith 17. Er hat um Juni 1266 in Scotland Ada De Baliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1283 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton è nato il il 24 giugno 1250 nel Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Christina Nasmith, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Ada De Baliol circa giugno 1266, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1283, nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lindsay - Lord of Lambertonが1250年6月24日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアモーディントンで生まれた時，父Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lambertonは20歳，母Christina Nasmithは17歳であった。約1266年6月にスコットランドでAda De Baliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年11月6日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton(이)가 1250년 6월 24일 스컷랜드 버윅실르 모르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Nasmith(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1266년 6월 스컷랜드에서 Ada De Baliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.24 June 1250–6 November 1283: 24 de junho de 1250–6 de novembro de 1283
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton nasceu em 24 de junho de 1250, em Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Christina Nasmith, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada De Baliol aproximadamente junho de 1266, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1283, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton родился 24 июня 1250 г. в местности мордингтон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Nasmith, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada De Baliol около июнь 1266 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1283 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.24 June 1250–6 November 1283: 24 de junio de 1250–6 de noviembre de 1283
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton nació el 24 de junio de 1250, en Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Christina Nasmith, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Ada De Baliol aproximadamente junio de 1266, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1283, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
